title: Geranium Rothbury Gem Cranesbill Compact Deciduous Pink Flowering Garden Shrub (20-30cm (Incl. Pot))
features: Characteristics: Compact, low-growing deciduous shrub with small, rounded grey-green leaves and pink flowers appearing from late Spring.
Growth & Spread: Ultimate height and spread of 0.1 – 0.5m.
Period of Interest: Spring and Summer interest. Soft pink flowers with deep pink veins and centres from late Spring to Summer. Occasional second bloom in Summer.
Water & Maintenance: Plant in fertile, humus-rich, well-drained soil. Keep in full or partial sun. Slightly acidic soils may give a richer flower colour.
